meta_title: For Founders: project management to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: PM Strategies to Ship Your AI SaaS Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on your AI project. Learn how to master project management, leverage Claude Code and Antigravity to build, ship, and monetize your SaaS faster.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is feature creep disguised as perfectionism. You solve this by implementing a 'constrained-scope' project management framework. By treating your MVP as a revenue-focused experiment rather than a technical masterpiece, you force yourself to ship, gather market feedback, and iterate based on actual user data.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS is littered with 'perfect' codebases that never saw a single paying user. You are caught in the loop of infinite iteration, where every new feature feels like a necessary step, but in reality, it is a sophisticated form of procrastination. You have the vision, but the execution layer is suffocating under the weight of your own ambition.

It is time to pivot from being a perfectionist to becoming a ship-fast operator. By integrating rigorous project management with high-velocity tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you strip away the friction of development. We aren't here to write perfect code; we are here to build a business that scales.

steps.title: Define the 'Must-Have' Revenue Vector
steps.description: Identify the single feature that solves a burning pain point for which a user will pay. Everything else is secondary and must be cut.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project requirements and extract the 'Core Revenue Vector'. Ignore all secondary features and output a prioritized roadmap focused exclusively on the MVP.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'create a prioritized feature list based on the core revenue vector'

steps.title: Modular Architecture Scaffolding
steps.description: Use a modular approach to build your MVP so you can swap out components later without refactoring the entire codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular directory structure for a Next.js SaaS MVP that isolates the auth, payment, and core AI logic modules.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'scaffold project structure with modular separation'

steps.title: Automated Context Injection
steps.description: Ensure your LLM agents have perfect context of your codebase to prevent hallucinated bugs that stall development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a context-manifest.json file that summarizes the critical business logic and API endpoints for my current project.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'analyze codebase and generate context-manifest.json'

steps.title: Rapid Iteration Loop Setup
steps.description: Establish a feedback loop where you build a feature, test it with AI, and deploy it to a staging environment within 2 hours.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a script to automate the deployment of my current feature branch to a preview environment for testing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'configure automated deployment pipeline for preview branches'

steps.title: Market Validation Gatekeeping
steps.description: Before adding any new feature, verify if the current version has reached a predefined usage metric.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a set of 3 key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure if my MVP is ready for a paid launch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate analytics dashboard code for monitoring MVP launch KPIs'

pro_tips: Never build a backend feature until you have a landing page with a waitlist that proves interest.
Use Claude Code to document your code as you write it; technical debt is just unmanaged documentation.
If a feature takes more than 3 days to build, it is too complex for an MVP—break it into smaller, atomic units.
Treat your codebase like a disposable asset; if it doesn't make money, delete it and pivot fast.
Automate your dev environment setup using CLI scripts; save 5 hours a week by removing manual configuration.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, spend 80% of your time on distribution and 20% on patching bugs. Do not add new features until you have your first 10 paying customers.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in a vacuum and start building for the market. Join a community of elite founders who prioritize shipping over perfection. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
